channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Booker predicts more Republican opposition to Trump
item.description: Democratic Sen. Cory Booker says he expects growing Republican resistance to Trump's agenda, citing his push for an anti-weaponization fund.

item.title: Watch: Unexplained loud booms reported along East Coast
item.description: Residents from New England to South Carolina have reported hearing mysterious loud booms over recent days.

item.title: Zelenskyy accuses Russia of abducting Ukrainian children and training them to fight
item.description: This is the first time President Zelenskyy has made such an allegation, which could amount to a war crime.

item.title: Diver describes heartwarming scenes after miners emerged from Laos cave
item.description: Lead rescue diver Mikko Paasi said it took him a moment to realize the four trapped miners had rescued themselves.
